endpoints.name: Retrieves a list of currently defined APIs in API meta list format.
endpoints.description: Retrieves a list of currently defined APIs in API meta list format.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{OPENAPI_API_KEY}} with your OPENAPI API KEY.

endpoints.name: Retrieves an API meta listing of all APIs defined for this owner
endpoints.description: Retrieves an API meta listing of all APIs defined for this owner
endpoints.notes: Replace {{OPENAPI_API_KEY}} with your OPENAPI API KEY. Replace {{OWNER}} with a real owner.

endpoints.name: Retrieves an API meta listing for all API versions for this owner and API
endpoints.description: Retrieves an API meta listing for all API versions for this owner and API
endpoints.notes: Replace {{OPENAPI_API_KEY}} with your OPENAPI API KEY. Replace {{API}} with a real api. Replace {{OWNER}} with a real owner.

endpoints.name: Saves the provided Swagger definition
endpoints.description: Saves the provided Swagger definition; the owner must match the token owner. The version will be extracted from the Swagger definitions itself.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{OPENAPI_API_KEY}} with your OPENAPI API KEY. Replace {{API}} with a real api. Replace {{OWNER}} with a real owner.

endpoints.name: Deletes the specified API
endpoints.notes: Replace {{OPENAPI_API_KEY}} with your OPENAPI API KEY. Replace {{API}} with a real api. Replace {{OWNER}} with a real owner.

endpoints.name: Publish a particular version of the specified API
endpoints.description: Publish a particular version of the specified API
endpoints.notes: Replace {{OPENAPI_API_KEY}} with your OPENAPI API KEY. Replace {{VERSION}} with a real version. Replace {{API}} with a real api. Replace {{OWNER}} with a real owner.

endpoints.name: Deletes a particular version of the specified API
endpoints.description: Deletes a particular version of the specified API
endpoints.notes: Replace {{OPENAPI_API_KEY}} with your OPENAPI API KEY. Replace {{VERSION}} with a real version. Replace {{API}} with a real api. Replace {{OWNER}} with a real owner.

endpoints.name: Retrieves the Swagger definition for the specified API and version in JSON format
endpoints.description: Retrieves the Swagger definition for the specified API and version in JSON format
endpoints.notes: Replace {{OPENAPI_API_KEY}} with your OPENAPI API KEY. Replace {{VERSION}} with a real version. Replace {{API}} with a real api. Replace {{OWNER}} with a real owner.

endpoints.name: Retrieves the Swagger definition for the specified API and version in YAML format
endpoints.description: Retrieves the Swagger definition for the specified API and version in YAML format
endpoints.notes: Replace {{OPENAPI_API_KEY}} with your OPENAPI API KEY. Replace {{VERSION}} with a real version. Replace {{API}} with a real api. Replace {{OWNER}} with a real owner.

endpoints.name: Log in to OpenAPI space
endpoints.notes: Replace {{OPENAPI_API_KEY}} with your OPENAPI API KEY.

endpoints.name: Log in to OpenAPI space using an APInf account
endpoints.description: Log in to OpenAPI space using an APInf account
endpoints.notes: Replace {{OPENAPI_API_KEY}} with your OPENAPI API KEY.

endpoints.name: Log in to OpenAPI space using an APInf authentication token
endpoints.description: Log in to OpenAPI space using an APInf authentication token
endpoints.notes: Replace {{OPENAPI_API_KEY}} with your OPENAPI API KEY.

endpoints.name: Log out from OpenAPI space
endpoints.notes: Replace {{OPENAPI_API_KEY}} with your OPENAPI API KEY.

endpoints.notes: Replace {{OPENAPI_API_KEY}} with your OPENAPI API KEY.
